headline: Lawsuit claims Exxon Mobil, Empire Petroleum defrauded taxpayers in orphan well scheme
summary: Abandoned oil and gas wells present a potential billion-dollar problem for taxpayers. A Colorado accountant and a Taos-based data analyst have put forth a lawsuit that shows, they believe, one way to hold even the largest oil and gas companies accountable for the cleanup costs being pushed onto the state. Greg Rogers and Theron Horton have alleged two companies — including one of the top ...
